name: OpenRouter
description: Registers OpenRouter as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream chat, image-generation, and embedding model discovery.

env.description: Fallback OpenRouter API key used for discovery, inference, and embeddings when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: OpenRouter API key
settings.description: OpenRouter API key used for model discovery, inference, and embeddings. Falls back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.description: Refreshes OpenRouter chat and image-generation models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: OpenRouter Embeddings
providers.description: Refreshes OpenRouter embedding models and embeds text through OpenRouter's embeddings API.
